CustomField.description: This is for determine a general grouping of the Opp/Lead using Opp stage first, then lead stage if blank
CustomField.formula: IF( Opp_Stage__c = null, "Lead: ","Opp: ") & BLANKVALUE( Opp_Stage__c , Lead_Stage__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is for determine a general grouping of the Opp/Lead using Opp stage first, then lead stage if blank
CustomField.label: Deal Stage
